hello-world/pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 11 to Java 17 to target the new JDK version.
hello-world/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; compiling with release 11 would produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or fail if the source code uses Java 17 features.

hello-world/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 17.
hello-world/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 17 bytecode, aligning with the property change and preventing potential mismatches.
